tasks.label: Publicar no GitHub
args: $branch = git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; git add .; git diff --cached --quiet; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0) { Write-Host 'Sem alteracoes para enviar.'; exit 0 }; $message = '${input:commitMessage}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($message)) { $message = 'update' }; git commit -m $message; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git push origin $branch
